iced-coffee-shakerato.name: Iced Coffee Shakerato

ingredients.item: Espresso or 3 ounces very strong coffee

instructions: Combine espresso, sweetened condensed milk, and simple syrup in a cocktail shaker. Fill shaker with ice, cover, and shake vigorously until outside of shaker is very cold and mixture inside is very, very frothy, about 30 seconds.
Using a cocktail strainer or slotted spoon to hold back ice while allowing foam and some small ice chips to pass through, pour into an ice-filled glass.

individual-apple-pies-argiro.name: Individual Apple Pies
instructions: For individual apple pies, clean the apples first and cut them into thin slides. At the same time, Crush the cookies and mix them with cinnamon.
We'll need 4 disabled forms or 4 ramekin.
Add butter, honey, cream and salt to a saucepan. Mix to dissolve and as soon as they bowl, leave 3-4 minutes to form dick blisters.
Balance half the filling-sole in 4 forms and then, with half the amount of apple, make one layer of fruit in each.
Continue with half the Crushed biscuits and repeat with the remaining apples, 1 layer in each form. Finish with a layer of cookies and pour each form with the remaining sauce.
Place the moulds on a rack and sprinkle with raw sugar.
Bake them in a well preheated oven at 200.4. 3
Let them stand for 5 minutes in the form and turn over.
Serve with whipped cream

individual-village-spinach-pie-argiro.name: Individual Village Spinach Pie
instructions: All grasses are Washed and well drained. You can make your own homemade Peasant Leaf.
We cut them in a pelvis.
Finely chop the dried onions with their leads and Tender leads.
Add them to the grasses. Finely chop the myronolakana (myronia, cauliflowers, wild cupcakes etc) and the dill and add them.
Salt and pepper well and rub a little with the hands gently wither and drop their volume.
Add the trahanas and feta cheese in the sandwiches and mix well.
Beat eggs, yogurt and olive oil in bowls.
Add half the mixture to the greens and mix well. Allow the filling to stand a little while while and the trainas to fuck its fluids. If the grass is very dump, drag the filling with the hand.
In the remaining liquid egg mixture, add some water to dilute the text (3-4 tabletspoons).
Cut each left into 3 stripes. Brush with the egg solution.
Touch two tabletspoons of filling in each lane and close in a large single triangle. By joining down, touch on an oily baking pan or laminated with non-stick paper.
Brush with some solution or olive oil.
Bake in two sets the triangles at 180oC in the air for about 45′′, up and down the baking pans in between, brown the triangles and crisp the Leaf.

instant-pot-loaded-baked-potato-soup.name: Instant Pot Loaded Baked Potato Soup
instructions: Turn on a multi-functional pressure cooker (such as Instant Pot) and select Sauté function. Add onion, bacon, and butter to the hot pot and sauté until bacon is crispy, 5 to 8 minutes. Turn off Sauté function and transfer contents to a small bowl.

Add potatoes, water, and garlic base to pot and close and lock the lid. Select high pressure according to manufacturer's instructions; set timer for 12 minutes. Allow 10 to 15 minutes for pressure to build.

Release pressure using the natural-release method according to manufacturer's instructions, about 15 minutes. Release remaining pressure carefully using the quick-release method, about 5 minutes. Unlock and remove the lid. Mash potatoes against the side of the pot, leaving some chunks if desired. Add onion-bacon mixture and half-and-half; stir to combine.
Ladle into soup bowls and top with green onions, Cheddar cheese, and black pepper.

instant-pot-chicken-and-tortilla-soup.name: Instant Pot® Chicken And Tortilla Soup
instructions: Combine chicken broth, tomatoes, corn, onion, cauliflower rice, quinoa, garlic, chili powder, cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper in a multi-functional pressure cooker (such as Instant Pot®). Add chicken breast. Close and lock the lid. Select high pressure according to manufacturer's instructions; set timer for 7 minutes. Allow 10 to 15 minutes for pressure to build.
Meanwhile heat oil in a skillet over moderately high heat. Add tortilla strips and cook until golden, about 1 minute. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.

Release pressure using the natural-release method according to manufacturer's instructions, about 15 minutes. Release remaining pressure carefully using the quick-release method according to manufacturer's instructions, about 5 minutes. Unlock and remove the lid. Remove chicken and shred or cut into bite-sized pieces.
Return chicken to pot to warm. Ladle into soup bowls and top with fried tortilla strips.

instant-pot-creamy-chicken-stew.name: Instant Pot® Creamy Chicken Stew
instructions: Turn on a multi-functional pressure cooker (such as Instant Pot®), add butter, and select Saute function. Add chicken thighs to melted butter and sear, 4 to 5 minutes per side. Remove chicken and set aside.
Add carrots, onion, and celery; cook until onions begin to soften, about 5 minutes. Add garlic and saute until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add 1/2 cup chicken broth and stir to deglaze the pot.

Add chicken thighs back to the pot along with remaining chicken broth, potatoes, flour, Worcestershire sauce, bay leaves, poultry seasoning, thyme, pepper, rosemary, and salt. Stir together, then close and lock the lid.
Switch to high pressure according to manufacturer's instructions; set timer for 10 minutes. Allow 10 to 15 minutes for pressure to build.

Release pressure using the natural-release method according to manufacturer's instructions for 10 minutes. Release remaining pressure carefully using the quick-release method according to manufacturer's instructions, about 5 minutes. Unlock and remove the lid.
Remove chicken and shred or cut into bite-sized pieces. Return to the pot. Remove and discard bay leaves.
Set cooker to Saute. Add heavy cream and bring to a boil. Add frozen peas to boiling stew and cook, stirring as needed, until heated through, about 5 minutes.

iron-skillet-baked-potatoes.name: Iron Skillet Baked Potatoes
instructions: Pour canola oil evenly onto the bottom of a room-temperature, 10-inch cast iron skillet. Sprinkle rosemary and seasoned salt evenly over oil. Place potatoes, cut-side down, in 1 layer at the bottom of the skillet. Press down on potatoes so cut-side is coated in canola oil.
Place the cold skillet into a cold oven. Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Bake until potatoes are easily pierced with a fork, about 45 minutes.

italian-beef-sandwich-recipe-comedera.name: Italian Beef Sandwich Recipe

ingredients.item: 400 gr de roast beef o falda de res ((bien marmoleada))
2  panes tipo hoagie o baguette crujiente de 20 cm
250 ml de caldo de res casero o bajo en sodio
50 ml de vino tinto ((opcional, para dar profundidad))
4 cdas de giardiniera italiana ((encurtido de verduras en aceite y vinagre))
Provolone or mozzarella cheeses, fresh (in sheets (optional, for gratification))

instructions: Sella la carne en una olla profunda con aceite de oliva caliente hasta que adquiera un dorado uniforme. Retira y reserva.
The onion, garlic and peppers are pitted in the same pot until slightly caramelized.
Agrega el vino tinto para desglasar el fondo, raspando con una cuchara de madera.
Add re stock, dried herbs, laurel and chili pits. Fold well.
Return the meat to the pot, cover and cook with low heat for 1 hour and 30 minutes, till you are very tender.
Remove the meat and scrape them into strands with the help of two forks and put them back into the juice. It cooks 10 more minutes to absorb flavors.
Cut the loaves and have them slightly in frying pan or oven to put up with moisture.
Filling every bread with juicy meat, add salted peppers and a touch of giardiniera.
If you want a cheese version, put provolone sheets and plate a few minutes in hot oven.
It serves immediately, accompanied with a small bowl of juice to wet the sandwich before every bite, as did in Chicago.

italian-dessert-caprese-cake-comedera.name: Italian Dessert: Caprese Cake

ingredients.item: 200  g chocolate negro para fundir (al menos 50% cacao)

instructions: Con ayuda de un procesador de alimentos pica las almendras. Reserva.
A bowl pits clear and bates with 50 g of sugar and a pint of salt till they double their size (turret point). Reserve.
Fold chocolate to a tidal or microwave bath for 10 second rounds to prevent it from burning or getting bitter.
In another clean bowl, pour the remaining white sugar and butter. Bate until the ingredients are fully incorporated, do not have pomegranate in the mixture and the dough is fluffy.
Agrega las yemas, una por una, sin dejar de batir.
Agrega el chocolate fundido y mezcla.
Agrega las almendras picadas.
Finally, add clear with the help of a Silicone Spatula and an encircling blend to prevent the mixture from losing volume.
Carefully pour the mixture into your previously oiled baking bowl and put the pressurized oven at 170ºC for 40 minutes.
Retire from the oven, let cool at room temperature for 2 hrs and then decorate with cheesebirds with a pallet.

italian-style-strawberry-shortcake.name: Italian-style Strawberry Shortcake

ingredients.item: Container frozen whipped topping (such as cool whip®)

instructions: Reserve a few pretty strawberry slices for garnish; place remaining strawberries in a bowl and sprinkle with sugar. Set aside until sugar melts and berries release juices, about 10 minutes.

Combine mascarpone and whipped topping in a separate bowl. Place cake pieces in a trifle dish; spread strawberries and juice over top. Top with mascarpone cream; decorate with reserved strawberry slices. Refrigerate until ready to serve.

2-ingredient-fruit-dip.name: 2-ingredient Fruit Dip
instructions: Using an electric mixer, beat cream cheese until smooth.
Add marshmallow creme and blend until smooth.

3-ingredient-oven-custard-recipe-lezzet.name: 3 Ingredient Oven Custard Recipe
instructions: 1. Take milk, powder sugar and wet to a medium you pan.
2. Wire with suede cook until string in the middle fire without rubing.
3. Get from the stove and wait for the first temperature by mixing 1-2 minutes.
4. Share the prepared variety of heat resistant oven containers.
5. Place containers in a deep tray and add hot water until half of the tray (mari method).
6. Öpreheated from 200°C to cook about 15–20 minutes until they create a mild brown sheet.
7. Listen to at least 2 hours in the refrigerator after arriving at room temperature.
8. You are ready to serve your oven.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

4-ingredient-stuffed-steak.name: 4-ingredient Stuffed Steak

ingredients.item: Mccormick® grill mates® sweet & smoky rub

instructions: Lay the skirt steak strips on a cutting board and cover with plastic wrap. Use a heavy skillet or food mallet to pound each strip to less than ¼-inch thickness.

Generously season the pounded steaks on both sides with McCormick® Grill Mates® Sweet & Smoky Rub. Place 5 slices pepper Jack cheese on each steak. Tightly roll up each steak lengthwise to create pinwheels.
Tie butcher twine around each pinwheel about 2 inches apart from one another. Slice each pinwheel in half lengthwise.
Preheat the grill to a two-zone high heat temperature, around 204°C (200°C).
Sear the pinwheels on the hot side of the grill for about 2 minutes per side, or until a nice crust develops.
Move the pinwheels to the cooler side of the grill and continue cooking for 8-10 more minutes, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of each pinwheel reaches 49°C (49°C).
Remove the pinwheels from the grill and let rest for 10 minutes before removing the twine and serving.
Enjoy!
